name: fsktm-zkp-system
description: > **Zero-Knowledge Proof-Based Authentication for Passwordless Login in a Web-Based Evaluation System for UTHM FSKTM Postgraduate Research Symposium**

scripts.dev: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev"
scripts.dev:host: concurrently -n BACKEND,FRONTEND -c blue,green "npm --prefix backend run dev" "npm --prefix frontend run dev:host"
scripts.check: npm --prefix backend run check && npm --prefix frontend run check
scripts.git:publish: npm run git:save && npm run git:push
